name: Thai Style Beef Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh, raw spinach leaves, well washed and stems discarded
1 pint cherry tomatoes, cut in half
1 pound beef flank steak, cut into 1/4 thick strips, sliced against the grain
2 tablespoons roasted and ground cumin seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad by combining all the vegetables in a large bowl.
2. In a separate container, combine the tamarind with sugar and rice wine to create a marinade.
3. Toss the marinade with the vegetables.
4. Heat half the peanut oil in a wok or large skillet until hot.
5. Add half the beef, season with salt and pepper, and cook quickly over high heat.
6. As the beef sears well but before it overcooks, remove from the pan and briefly set aside.
7. Repeat the cooking process with the remaining beef.
8. When both batches of beef are similarly cooked, return them to the pan and quickly heat together.
9. Add the ginger, cumin, basil, and fish sauce. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes more.
10. Serve by pouring over and wilting the marinated vegetable salad.
11. Serve with glutinous rice that has soaked raw overnight and then steamed for 30 minutes.
Yield: 4 portions.
